4.note: Paste this:  > Verified indirectly. If the scheme handler weren't intercepting `homefit-local://`, the bundle couldn't fetch `/api/plan/<id>` from same-origin and the preview would still show "Plan not found". Preview loads with exercises + videos → scheme is working. Direct Web Inspector confirmation deferred (iOS 16.4+ requires `isInspectable=true` on the WKWebView; not set yet).
